---
id: get-spread-history
title: "Get daily bond spread history"
description: "Returns persisted z-spread and g-spread snapshots plus server-side z-score statistics."

hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get daily bond spread history"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/instruments/{id}/spread-history"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns persisted z-spread and g-spread snapshots plus server-side z-score statistics.
